nodes.speaker: Alien7
lines: My pilot ran the Cyclops route this morning and went dark. Not crashed-dark. QUIET-dark. Power-dark. Marlo's in the shadow cone, has to be — there's no sun in there, and her panels are her heart.

responses.buttonText: What do you need from me?

nodes.speaker: Alien7
lines: Best freight pilot on the Abode, and the only one who'll still fly past the Bean. She's run my routes eleven years without a scratch.
Eleven years, and the one morning I say 'take the short way through the shadow'—

responses.buttonText: What do you need from me?

nodes.speaker: Alien7
lines: You have that ridiculous artificial sun bolted to your ship, don't you? The Lebron thing.
No sun reaches the cone. So BRING one. Hold it over her panels until her heart starts. GO.
